active_work.text: Draft PR #489 is clean and green at 03fdda1; it remains partial and not release-ready.

Main R-CMD-check 27720099917 and pkgdown 27720668325 completed successfully at 0567cd7. Newer scheduled full-check 27752749643 also completed successfully on windows-latest, ubuntu-latest, and macos-latest at the same head. This is main CI health evidence only, not release readiness.

Run 27722546237 completed successfully and pushed 5969f6f to power-pilot-results; run 27735802023 cancelled without branch movement. Run 27752884846 completed success at 2026-06-18T14:07:44Z with 51/51 jobs successful and pushed power-pilot-results 1a2aac6 (run 110). The remote store now has 48 cells, 29176 / 480000 reps, 1/48 cells at cap, signal mean coverage 0.748, pass94 3/24, pass95 2/24, null mean coverage-under-null 0.426, 28 flagged cells, and 28 coverage anomalies. Local pilot reached 383510 / 480000 reps at iter 24. Fisher/Curie scoring still blocks coverage or power promotion.

#95 is merged and main CI is green; #101 is draft/open and clean at f7be594, local merge-ref bridge slice passed 641/641, and local live JuliaCall bridge suite passed. Maintainer-approved close/reopen triggered fresh PR CI run 27763712855 and Documenter run 27763712914; both completed successfully. #94 remains dirty salvage.

Article council slice 5A started the biological worked-example triage, and the first Psi cleanup anchor sweep now renders. api-keyword-grid, covariance-correlation, model-selection-latent-rank, and cross-lineage-coevolution separate standalone indep() from explicit Psi/unique() language. This is article-claim cleanup only, not bridge, release, or scientific-coverage completion.

Fixed named multi-kernel engine slice landed locally as latent-only: KER-03 covered by non-heavy and heavy kernel/coevolution tests; COE-03 remains partial for component-specific Gamma_shape extraction only; COE-04 recovery/separation diagnostics remain blocked. kernel_unique()/*_unique() stays compatibility syntax for now and should be redesigned/deprecated after this arc. PR green != bridge complete != release ready != scientific coverage passed.

evidence.text: Implemented fixed named multi-kernel TMB path for two or more dense kernel_latent() tiers over the same grouping levels, with per-tier K_r, Lambda_r, and latent field. The Paper 2 path is latent-only; paired kernel_unique()/Psi is deferred because it is a poor default for non-Gaussian and cross-family coevolution, and *_unique() should move to post-arc compatibility/deprecation planning. Updated extract_Sigma()/extract_Gamma() to resolve named components, kept the one-name KER-02 phylo-equivalent path intact, added KER-03 / COE-03 / COE-04 register rows, and regenerated kernel_latent.Rd. Checks: devtools::test(filter = "kernel|coevolution") -> PASS 112 with 4 expected heavy skips; GLLVMTMB_HEAVY_TESTS=1 devtools::test(filter = "kernel|coevolution") -> PASS 138; pkgdown::check_pkgdown() -> No problems found with Pandoc on PATH; rcmdcheck --no-manual with _R_CHECK_FORCE_SUGGESTS_=false -> 0 errors, 1 Apple clang/R header install warning, 0 notes. This is engine/extractor evidence only, not bridge completion, release readiness, or scientific coverage.

First anchor sweep implemented: api-keyword-grid now recommends indep() for standalone diagonal models and unique() for explicit Psi; covariance-correlation is reframed around explicit Psi; model-selection-latent-rank uses indep() for the d = 0 diagonal baseline; cross-lineage-coevolution centers kernel_latent()/extract_Gamma() and describes kernel_unique() as fixture Psi. pkgdown::build_articles(lazy = FALSE), pkgdown::check_pkgdown(), HTML rg checks, JSON validation, and git diff --check passed. This is article-claim cleanup only, not bridge, release, or scientific-coverage completion.

Current checkout confirms the one-kernel Design 65 coevolution workflow is implemented and still green: C0 make_cross_kernel/prototype, C1 single named dense kernel equivalence, C2 point-estimate extract_Gamma known-Gamma recovery, C2 article fixture, and C3 guardrail tests passed with GLLVMTMB_HEAVY_TESTS=1 (`FAIL 0 | WARN 0 | SKIP 0 | PASS 125`). The full Paper 2 Option B model is not finished: two independent named kernels, estimated/profiled rho, Gamma_shape/Gamma_effect, bootstrap intervals, mixed-family recovery, and two-kernel identifiability simulations remain future gates.

Fresh PR checks from the maintainer-approved close/reopen completed successfully without pushing code: CI run 27763712855 and Documenter run 27763712914 both succeeded at head f7be594. #101 is open/draft and clean. This clears the fresh Julia PR-check gate, but it is not bridge completion, release readiness, or scientific coverage.

Article council slice 5A started the biological worked-example triage: behavioural-syndromes stays internal as a Tier 3 candidate Tier 1 draft, now with explicit YAML and a gate note. Public promotion waits for a runnable wide-format fit, diagnostic_table() evidence, clearer reader path, Florence figure review, and rendered HTML review. This is article-readiness progress only, not bridge, release, or scientific-coverage completion.

Article council slice 4 completed: gllvm-vocabulary returned as a visible Tier 2 Technical reference glossary with scope wording and hidden-page links pruned; data-shape-flowchart and stacked-trait-gllvm are explicitly Tier 3 internal drafts with gate notes. Pitfalls now links to the public glossary instead of saying it is under audit. This is reader-path cleanup only, not bridge, release, or scientific-coverage completion.

Article council slice 3 completed: profile-likelihood-ci and troubleshooting-profile moved out of the internal bucket into the public Technical reference group, profile-likelihood-ci now has Tier 2 YAML and explicit CI-01..CI-10/EXT-13 scope wording, pkgdown::check_pkgdown() passed, and pkgdown::build_articles(lazy = FALSE) rendered both pages. This is reader-path cleanup only, not bridge, release, or scientific-coverage completion.

Completed power-pilot run 27752884846 succeeded at main 0567cd7 and moved power-pilot-results 5969f6f -> 1a2aac6 (1a2aac654e877a34b3e590f0269d10cca05a43e7). The scored remote run-110 store has 48 cells, 29176 / 480000 reps, 1/48 cells at cap, signal mean coverage 0.748, pass94 3/24, pass95 2/24, null mean coverage-under-null 0.426, 28 flagged cells, and 28 coverage anomalies. The scoring audit, run against the remote run-110 store plus the local store, blocks promotion: gaussian-d1-n150-sig0p0 coverage 0.390 with one-sided misses, nbinom2-d2-n50-sig0p0 coverage 0.899 with 76% non-PD, and binomial_probit-d1-n50-sig0p2 coverage 0.959 but 34% non-PD and extremely wide intervals. CI-excludes-zero remains diagnostic only for Sigma_unit_diag, not valid Type-I error.

Maintainer-approved close/reopen triggered fresh PR checks without pushing code: CI run 27763712855 is in progress and Documenter run 27763712914 completed successfully at head f7be594. #101 was open/draft with mergeStateStatus UNSTABLE while CI ran, so this was trigger evidence only, not bridge completion.
